alkylation reagent: alkylated by 4 μl 1 M iodoacetamide (IAM) in the darkroom for 30 min.
cleavage agent: digested by addition of trypsin/Lys-C (Promega, Madison, WI)
collision energy: at a normalized collision energy of 30%
enrichment method: we raised antibodies against the five most prevalent monomethyl sites
fragmentation method: Precursors were fragmented in HCD activation mode
instrument: coupled to a Orbitrap Fusion Mass Spectrometer
labeling: We used a mass spectrometry approach to characterize Tau PTMs
